executives.name: Alan Carter
executives.background: Dr. Carter has over 30 years of experience in the exploration and mining industry. He was a co-founder of Peregrine Diamonds Ltd. and Magellan Minerals Ltd. He previously worked for Rio Tinto and BHP Billiton.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer and Director

executives.name: Paul Smith
executives.background: Mr. Smith is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in financial management and reporting. He has served as CFO for several public mining companies.

executives.name: Guilherme Cavalcanti
executives.background: Mr. Cavalcanti has extensive experience in the Brazilian mining sector, having worked with major companies in project development and operations.

board_of_directors.name: Alan Carter
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Carter has over 30 years of experience in the exploration and mining industry. He was a co-founder of Peregrine Diamonds Ltd. and Magellan Minerals Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Dennis Higginson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Higginson has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in exploration and project management. He has held senior positions with several junior mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Smith
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Smith is a professional engineer with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He has served as CEO and Director of several public companies.

board_of_directors.name: Rodney Cooper
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Cooper is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in operations, project management, and corporate development. He was previously COO of Kinross Gold.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Management and Directors Page
